title: volila Glass Bottles with Stoppers 150ml 6 Pack, Clear Swing Top Bottles for Homebrewing, Beverages, Kombucha, Wine, Vinegar and Oil
features: 🍺【 Multi Functional 】Crafted from a high-grade soda lime glass, these swing top bottles serve multiple purposes. They are ideal for various beverages and storage bottles for liquid such as juice, kombucha bottles, cooking oils, vinegar, soda, sloe gin, water, milk, beer bottles for home brewing, wine bottles, and smoothies.

🍋【 Brewer's Kit 】 This set of clear glass bottles comes in a pack of 6 with 12 black labels, a pen, and a funnel. The glass bottles with lids have a 150ml capacity. The swing stopper provides airtight, leakproof storage for your homebrew. You can reuse these kombucha jar bottles and clean them in the dishwasher. However, avoid boiling these flip top bottles to prevent breakage.

🍑【 Securely Wrapped 】 We prioritize the safety of your glass bottles during shipping. Our glass bottle with stopper is meticulously wrapped in bubble wrap packaging with grid lock in between the glasses. The accessories are sealed in an OPP bag within a sturdy double-walled box. Additionally, there's a Fragile warning label printed on all four sides to ensure the safety of your beer bottles.

🍏【 Quick Lock and Seal Design 】The swing-top design enables for quick opening and closing. It's ideal for keeping craft beer and carbonated beverages. The leakproof lid keeps your drinks safe and pleasant even when you're on the go. To open the swing top bottles, lift the wire up, and to close it, swing the lid down and press it firmly.

🍶【 Warranty 】 At volila, your happiness is our priority. Every purchase of our clear glass bottles with stoppers comes with a 100% warranty. Should you encounter any concerns or issues with this glass juice bottles, don't hesitate to reach out to us. Your peace of mind is our promise!
